message:
feat(web): add debug HTTP server for runtime inspection

Introduce a debug endpoint module and supporting assets for runtime
introspection:

- src/web/debug.rs (514 lines): debug HTTP handlers that expose
  runtime state (scheduler queues, timer wheel, active tasks, memory
  usage) via JSON endpoints and a human-readable dashboard. Gated
  behind the new "debug-server" feature flag so production builds
  carry zero overhead.
- assets/dashboard.html: self-contained HTML dashboard that polls
  the debug endpoints and renders real-time charts of scheduler
  throughput, timer expiry rates, and memory watermarks.
- src/web/mod.rs: register the debug submodule.
- Cargo.toml: add "debug-server" feature flag (no new deps required
  for the debug server itself).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,10 @@ proc-macros = ["dep:asupersync-macros"]
 tower = ["dep:tower"]
 # Enable LZ4 compression for trace files.
 trace-compression = ["dep:lz4_flex"]
+# Enable debug HTTP server for runtime inspection.
+debug-server = []
+# Enable TOML config file loading for RuntimeBuilder.
+config-file = ["dep:toml"]
 # Enable io_uring reactor for Linux modern async I/O (requires kernel 5.1+).
 io-uring = ["dep:io-uring"]
 # Enable TLS support via rustls
@@ -78,6 +82,8 @@ rustls-native-certs = { version = "0.8", optional = true }
 webpki-roots = { version = "0.26", optional = true }
 # PEM file parsing for TLS certificates
 rustls-pemfile = { version = "2.2", optional = true }
+# Optional TOML config file support for RuntimeBuilder
+toml = { version = "0.8", optional = true }
 
 [target.'cfg(target_os = "linux")'.dependencies]
 io-uring = { version = "0.7.11", optional = true }
@@ -96,6 +102,7 @@ tracing = "0.1"
 tracing-subscriber = "0.3"
 opentelemetry_sdk = { version = "0.28", default-features = false, features = ["metrics", "testing"] }
 lz4_flex = "0.11"
+toml = "0.8"
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "phase0_baseline"
